title: Module 1 quiz: HF Hub and ecosystem

choices.text: Models (1M+), Datasets (500K+), Spaces (300K+ live demos), Libraries (Transformers, Datasets, PEFT, Accelerate, TRL, Diffusers). The dominant open-source AI platform in 2026. Each asset has version-controlled git repo + card / docs + community discussions. API tokens for programmatic access. Free tier: unlimited public repos + limited Spaces compute. Pro: private repos + scale.

questions.explanation: Models + Datasets + Spaces + Libraries. Dominant open-source AI platform.

questions.prompt: Best model family for RAG embeddings?

choices.text: sentence-transformers (BGE, MPNet, MiniLM, E5). Purpose-built for embedding text to vector space. LLMs (Llama, Mistral) for generation; sentence-transformers for retrieval embeddings. Two-stage RAG: embed via sentence-transformers; generate via LLM.

questions.explanation: sentence-transformers (BGE, MPNet, MiniLM, E5). Purpose-built for embeddings; not LLMs.

choices.text: `from datasets import load_dataset; ds = load_dataset('imdb')`. One-liner; entire 50k labeled reviews dataset loaded with train/test splits. Standard for 5000+ HF datasets. Streaming for huge data (streaming=True).

questions.explanation: load_dataset('imdb'). One-liner; HF Datasets library standard.

questions.prompt: Want to use Llama 3 commercially for small startup. Critical step?

choices.text: Verify license terms apply. Llama Community License allows commercial use below ~700M MAU + AUP compliance + Meta attribution. Small startup easily within scope. Click 'Access' on model card, agree to terms, get approval (instant), document license + scope. For pure permissive license: prefer Apache 2.0 models (Mistral, Phi).

questions.explanation: Verify Llama Community License terms. Commercial OK below 700M MAU; AUP compliance; attribution. Document.

choices.text: Contains: description + intended uses + out-of-scope warnings + bias/risks/limitations + training data + evaluation benchmarks + license + citation. Read before production / commercial use. 5-10 min investment; saves surprises. Document license + scope in project records. The contract between creator + user.

questions.explanation: Description + uses + warnings + license + benchmarks + training. Read before production use; document license.
